description: Natural Language to Color Correction Action Mappings for DaVinci Resolve

punchy_contrast.description: add curve with dark and bright points

skin.workflow: qualify skin tones, adjust within isolated area

sky.workflow: qualify blues and cyans in upper frame, adjust

foliage.workflow: qualify greens and yellows, adjust hue and saturation

subject_isolation.workflow: use magic mask or qualifier to isolate

face_work.workflow: window or qualifier on skin tones, track if moving

selective_soft.workflow: qualify skin, reduce detail in selection

film_stock.workflow: apply film emulation LUT or build manually with characteristic curves

emphatic_patterns.description: Patterns that boost or reduce intensity based on emphatic language. Amplifiers STACK - 'super mega ultra' applies all three boosts!

action_intensifiers.description: Action verbs that imply forceful adjustment

all_caps.description: Words in ALL CAPS indicate shouting/emphasis

alternative_fixes.description: lower lift, raise gain for natural contrast

fix.workflow: isolate skin with qualifier, adjust hue/saturation/temperature

typical_corrections.fix: add magenta tint or shift hue
desaturate reds or shift toward orange

fix.workflow: isolate sky with qualifier/gradient, adjust exposure and saturation
apply noise reduction or denoise in Resolve

soft_image.caution: sharpening cannot fix true focus issues

fix.workflow: use power windows or qualifiers to treat different areas separately
use CA correction in Resolve or lens correction
add subtle grain/dither, reduce processing, work in higher bit depth
use power windows to balance subject and background separately
use lift/gamma/gain color wheels to neutralize each tonal range
